effect_dsl_note: Effects are ordered. A simulator must resolve each effect and its queued triggers before advancing unless an op explicitly captures a batch result.

base.text: Deal 6 damage.

upgraded.text: Deal 9 damage.

base.text: Gain 5 Block.

upgraded.text: Gain 8 Block.

base.text: Deal 8 damage. Apply 2 Vulnerable.

upgraded.text: Deal 10 damage. Apply 3 Vulnerable.

base.text: Deal 6 damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile.

upgraded.text: Deal 8 damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile.

base.text: Gain 5 Block. Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of combat.

upgraded.text: Gain 5 Block. Upgrade all cards in your hand for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Body Slam

base.text: Deal damage equal to your current Block.

upgraded.text: Deal damage equal to your current Block.

implementation_notes: The dynamic value becomes the card base damage, then Strength, Weak, Vulnerable, and other attack modifiers apply normally.

base.text: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an Attack. Deal 14 damage.

upgraded.text: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an Attack. Deal 18 damage.

base.text: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.

upgraded.text: Deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.

base.text: Deal 12 damage. Apply 2 Weak.

upgraded.text: Deal 14 damage. Apply 3 Weak.

cards.name: Flex

base.text: Gain 2 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 2 Strength.

upgraded.text: Gain 4 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 4 Strength.

implementation_notes: Strength Down is a debuff and can be blocked by Artifact independently of the Strength gain.

base.text: Play the top card of your draw pile and Exhaust it.

upgraded.text: Play the top card of your draw pile and Exhaust it.

base.text: Deal 9 damage. Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

upgraded.text: Deal 12 damage. Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

base.text: Deal 14 damage. Strength affects this card 3 times.

upgraded.text: Deal 14 damage. Strength affects this card 5 times.

base.text: Gain 5 Block. Deal 5 damage.

upgraded.text: Gain 7 Block. Deal 7 damage.

cards.name: Perfected Strike

base.text: Deal 6 damage. Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.

upgraded.text: Deal 6 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.

implementation_notes: Count the played Perfected Strike itself even though the generic play pipeline has moved it to limbo. Exhausted Strike cards are not counted.

base.text: Deal 9 damage. Draw 1 card.

upgraded.text: Deal 10 damage. Draw 2 cards.

base.text: Gain 8 Block. Draw 1 card.

upgraded.text: Gain 11 Block. Draw 1 card.

base.text: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 3 times.

upgraded.text: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.

base.text: Deal 4 damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

upgraded.text: Deal 7 damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

base.text: Gain 7 Block. Exhaust a random card in your hand.

upgraded.text: Gain 9 Block. Exhaust a card in your hand.

base.text: Deal 5 damage twice.

upgraded.text: Deal 7 damage twice.

base.text: Draw 1 card. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.

upgraded.text: Draw 2 cards. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.

base.text: Deal 12 damage. Shuffle a Wound into your draw pile.

upgraded.text: Deal 17 damage. Shuffle a Wound into your draw pile.

base.text: Draw 3 cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.

upgraded.text: Draw 4 cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.

cards.name: Blood for Blood

base.text: Costs 1 less Energy for each time you lose HP this combat. Deal 18 damage.

upgraded.text: Costs 1 less Energy for each time you lose HP this combat. Deal 22 damage.

implementation_notes: Effective cost is max(0, printed_cost - player.hp_loss_events_this_combat). Each event counts once regardless of HP amount.

base.text: Lose 3 HP. Gain 2 Energy.

upgraded.text: Lose 3 HP. Gain 3 Energy.

base.text: Exhaust 1 card. Draw 2 cards.

upgraded.text: Exhaust 1 card. Draw 3 cards.

base.text: Ethereal. Deal 20 damage.

upgraded.text: Ethereal. Deal 28 damage.

base.text: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.

upgraded.text: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.

base.text: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.

upgraded.text: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.

base.text: Enemy loses 2 Strength. Exhaust.

upgraded.text: Enemy loses 3 Strength. Exhaust.

base.text: Deal 5 damage. If the enemy has Vulnerable, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.

upgraded.text: Deal 8 damage. If the enemy has Vulnerable, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.

base.text: Create a copy of an Attack or Power card in your hand.

upgraded.text: Create 2 copies of an Attack or Power card in your hand.

base.text: Double your current Block.

upgraded.text: Double your current Block.

upgraded.text: Whenever you draw a Status, draw 2 cards.

base.text: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 3 Block.

upgraded.text: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 4 Block.

base.text: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.

upgraded.text: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Flame Barrier

base.text: Gain 12 Block. Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 4 damage back.

upgraded.text: Gain 16 Block. Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 6 damage back.

implementation_notes: Triggers once per incoming attack hit.

base.text: Ethereal. Gain 10 Block.

upgraded.text: Ethereal. Gain 13 Block.

base.text: Lose 2 HP. Deal 15 damage.

upgraded.text: Lose 2 HP. Deal 20 damage.

cards.name: Infernal Blade

base.text: Add a random Attack into your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.

upgraded.text: Add a random Attack into your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.

implementation_notes: Uses the current character reward pool rather than Prismatic Shard colors. The excluded cards cannot be randomly generated in combat.

base.text: Gain 2 Strength.

upgraded.text: Gain 3 Strength.

upgraded.text: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain 5 Block.

cards.name: Rampage

base.text: Deal 8 damage. Increase this card’s damage by 5 this combat.

upgraded.text: Deal 8 damage. Increase this card’s damage by 8 this combat.

implementation_notes: Initialize this_card.combat_damage to 8 at combat start or when the card instance is created.

base.text: Deal 7 damage. Shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.

upgraded.text: Deal 10 damage. Shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.

upgraded.text: Gain 2 Energy. Exhaust.

upgraded.text: Gain 8 Block. If this card is Exhausted, gain 3 Energy.

implementation_notes: on_exhaust: gain 2 Energy (3 when upgraded), regardless of the source of Exhaust.

implementation_notes: Exhume cannot retrieve any Exhume card.

upgraded.text: Double your Strength.

upgraded.text: Lose 6 HP. Gain 2 Energy. Draw 5 cards. Exhaust.
